title: Cronquistianthus kalenbornianus
taxonomy: Cronquistianthus kalenbornianus is classified within the family Asteraceae, commonly known as the daisy or sunflower family. This classification places it within the tribe Senecioneae, a group of flowering plants often characterized by their small, composite flowers. Further, Cronquistianthus kalenbornianus is assigned to the subtribe Senecioninae, a subgroup within the tribe Senecioneae. Within the subtribe, it is often placed in the genus Cronquistianthus, which is a part of the large and diverse family Asteraceae. Overall, its classification reflects its evolutionary relationships and shared characteristics with other members of the Asteraceae family.
